name: Gilvan Samico
description: Gilvan Samico foi gravador e artista plástico recifense, um dos grandes nomes do Movimento Armorial. Sua obra dialoga com a xilogravura, o cordel, os mitos e os animais fantásticos da cultura popular nordestina.
de: Gilvan Samico was an engraver and visual artist from Recife, one of the great names of the Movimento Armorial. His work is in dialogue with woodcut engraving, cordel literature, the myths, and the fantastic animals of Northeastern popular culture.
